positive: A stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a nocturnal cityscape silhouette against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The foreground features abstract geometric representations of skyscrapers and arches, interlocking with stylized fauna like crescent moons and soaring stylized birds. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, saturated cyan, burnt orange, and muted gold, ensuring high contrast. The overall composition is centered and balanced, designed for optimal screen printing or DTG transfer, maintaining clean lines and visible linework. The style should evoke Art Deco meets contemporary pop-art, emphasizing sharp edges and graphic impact. Perfect for apparel placement.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermarks, text, low resolution, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, photorealism, messy, poor quality, gradient noise
